subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee and counseleth thee with that whereby the Cause of God, the Lord of all worlds, shall be exalted. By the life of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین یذکرک المظلوم و یوصیک بما یرتفع به امر الله رب العالمین لعمر الله ان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
